negative_variants.description: Specify Specparam Delay: keeps the file compilable but forces the observable output path low, so it can pass include/instance smoke checks while failing the required behavior to y must follow the logical value of a.

Specify Specparam Delay: keeps the main operator syntax but collapses the computed value through the wrong condition, so coarse smoke cases may run while boundary and waveform checks for Use specify/specparam delay syntax fail.
Specify Specparam Delay: introduces incorrect initialization or state bias, so startup and reset-sensitive checks fail while the model still compiles and produces activity.
Specify Specparam Delay: offsets the secondary metric or observable path, so the primary waveform may look plausible while calibrated checker evidence for y must follow the logical value of a fails.
Specify Specparam Delay: scales the final observable response, so compile and rough activity checks can pass while calibrated output checks for Use specify/specparam delay syntax fail.
